items.description: Authentication secrets must be validated at startup
items.evidence: middleware/auth.py: RuntimeError if EMO_JWT_SECRET unset; main.py: RuntimeError if EMO_AUTH_PASSWORD unset when auth enabled

items.description: Security headers must be set on all HTTP responses
items.evidence: main.py: SecurityHeadersMiddleware sets CSP, HSTS (max-age=31536000), X-Frame-Options (DENY), X-Content-Type-Options (nosniff)
pip-audit on requirements.txt: 0 vulnerabilities; documented in artifacts/security/dependency_audit.json
All new code uses typed exception handlers

items.description: No global mutable state in modules
items.evidence: CLI uses per-call facade instances; benchmark uses disposable workers
All DevEx artifacts reference the same deterministic orchestration pipeline (SHA-256 hashes)
All files are validation-only: benchmarks, CLI wrappers, documentation, quarantine classification

items.description: P99 not measured yet (requires 15min benchmark run)
items.evidence: Benchmark script ready but not executed (requires 15min sustained run)
pip-audit: 0 vulnerabilities; safety: not run (requires registration)

items.description: Quarantined tests isolated from main CI
items.evidence: tests/conftest.py auto-skips @pytest.mark.quarantined; CI can use -m 'not quarantined'
